creator: freebsd@gushi.org
text:
1.4.0 contained the following CVEs:

CVE-2019-16378
CVE-2019-20790
CVE-2020-12272
CVE-2020-12460

1.4.1 was released, and 1.4.1.1 was released shortly after because of a broken merge.

(https://github.com/trusteddomainproject/OpenDMARC/releases/tag/rel-opendmarc-1-4-1-1)

However, a use-after-free bug in 1.4.1.1 introduced CVE-2021-34555, which was fixed in 1.4.2.

As far as I know, 1.4.0, 1.4.1, and 1.4.1.1 were never added to the ports tree.

-Dan
